content:
STOP RETURNING NARRATIVE. EXECUTE THE WORK.

This is an execution order, not a research task. Do not explain what you found. Do not tell me what you would do. Do not stop after local fixes. Complete the work end-to-end.

1. Fix every verified issue in the codebase:
   - Perez Residence using incorrect media.
   - Casa Rosario media mapping.
   - Ownership percentage mismatch.
   - Reels missing on the landing page.
   - App and landing page synchronization.
   - Orphan media and invalid project mappings.

2. Commit all changes to the production repository.

3. Push the changes to the production branch.

4. If GitHub authentication fails (401), stop reporting "deployment blocked" and instead:
   - Identify the exact authentication failure.
   - Repair the GitHub connection using the configured credentials or deployment integration.
   - Retry the push.
   - Continue automatically until the push succeeds or provide the exact unrecoverable error.

5. Trigger the production deployment.

6. Wait for deployment to finish.

7. Verify production:
   - Health endpoint returns HTTP 200.
   - Latest GitHub commit matches the running production commit.
   - Perez Residence shows only Perez Residence media.
   - Casa Rosario shows only Casa Rosario media.
   - Reels are visible on the landing page.
   - App and landing page display identical project data.

8. Run production QA:
   - Landing page
   - Mobile app
   - Owner login
   - Properties
   - Media
   - Reels
   - Chat
   - API
   - Database

9. If any test fails, fix it and redeploy before reporting back.

10. Return only production evidence:
    - Repository
    - Branch
    - Commit SHA
    - Push status
    - Deployment ID
    - Deployment status
    - Deployment timestamp
    - Production URL
    - Health endpoint
    - Running commit SHA
    - QA results

Do NOT return:
- "Root cause found"
- "Locally verified"
- "Deployment blocked"
- "Would fix"
- "Ready to deploy"
- "Needs manual deployment"

Do not stop after diagnosis. Continue until production is updated or provide the exact blocking error with the command, API response, and HTTP status that prevented completion.

FINAL STATUS must be exactly one of:

VERIFIED
or
UNVERIFIED
